---
title: "Starting Microprocesor Labs!"
description: "Beginning my Microprocessors Journey"
author: ""
date: "5/14/26"
categories:
  - Microprocessors
  - labreport
draft: false
---
![](images/uPBoard.jpeg)

This fall semester (2026), I will be taking an upper division course called [Microprocessors Systems: Design & Application](https://hmc-e155.github.io) which focuses on microcontrollers and embedded system design, and how to apply HDL and logic to the real world. This summer, I'm doing some of the labs early (with approval) to better understand embedded systems and microcontrollers! My goal this summer (and future semester) is to focus on having a thorough engineering workflow. I want to not only understand and create embedded and physical systems, but also document these processes thoroughly.
